# Identities Management

**Slug:** `identities-management` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 28

Manage identity data related to users, groups and roles from your Talend Cloud account.

[← Back to API index](./README.md)

- [Group Management](#group-management) (8)

## Group Management

### `identities_management__assignUsersToAGroup`

```
POST /account/groups/{id}/users
```

Assign users to a group if not already in it

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes | Group id |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `string[]`.

```

```

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes | Group id |

```

```

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
